    Privacy Policy

    Introduction

    Effective Date: 01 September 2025

    Last Updated: 12 September 2025

    Welcome to V2M Inc. ("V2M," "we," "our," or "us"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use the V2M One mobile application ("App"). By using the App, you consent to the practices described below.

    By using the App, you agree to this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the App.

    Information We Collect

    • Vehicle make, model, and VIN (used only for vehicle identification; not considered personal data under most laws).
    • Car sound recordings and related diagnostic analysis.
    • Device information (operating system, device identifiers).
    • Connection data (IP address, Bluetooth).
    • Application activity and performance logs.

    Location Data

    We only request location access during test drives, and solely to ensure diagnostic accuracy. Location information is not used for any other purpose.

    • Approximate or precise location (via GPS, Wi-Fi, or mobile network) when necessary for test drives and diagnostic accuracy.

    Account Information

    • Email address and password (for account registration and login).
    • Biometric authentication (Face ID / Touch ID) processed only on your device; never stored or transmitted by V2M. Biometric data is processed only locally on your device by Apple or Google.

    V2M never has access to this data.

    How We Use Information

    • Provide and improve our vehicle sound diagnostics service.
    • Create and manage user accounts.
    • Authenticate users securely.
    • Connect with vehicles via Bluetooth and ensure App functionality.
    • Maintain security and prevent unauthorized activity.
    • Comply with applicable legal obligations.
    • Provide technical support and customer service.

    What We Do Not Collect

    • Names, addresses, or other personal identifiers.
    • Payment card data (all payments are processed by App Store / Google Play). Payments are processed exclusively by Apple App Store or Google Play; V2M never receives or stores credit card details.
    • Company data or KYC documentation (handled separately under B2B contracts).

    Sharing Of The Information

    We do not sell or rent your personal information. Data may be shared only in the following limited circumstances:

    • Service Providers: With trusted vendors who support hosting, analytics, or authentication.
    • Legal Requirements: To comply with applicable laws or lawful requests.
    • Business Transactions: If V2M is involved in a merger, acquisition, or asset transfer.

    Data Retention

    We retain data only as long as necessary to provide services, typically up to 24 months, unless required otherwise by law.

    • Account data (email, VIN) is retained while your account is active.
    • Diagnostic data may be retained for service improvement, unless you request deletion.
    • Biometric data is never stored by V2M.
    • Location and IP data are stored only as long as needed for functionality and security.

    Your Rights

    Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:

    • Access the data we hold about you.
    • Request correction or deletion of data.
    • Restrict or object to processing.
    • Withdraw consent for location tracking.
    • Request data portability.
    • Under the CCPA/CPRA, opt out of any "sale" or "sharing" of personal data (note: V2M does not sell data).

    Requests can be submitted to info@v2minc.com.

    Children's Privacy

    If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with information, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

    The App is not directed to children under 13 (or 16 in certain jurisdictions). We do not knowingly collect data from children. If we discover such collection, we will delete the data promptly.

    International Data Transfers

    Data may be stored on servers located in the United States, the European Union, and other regions. We apply safeguards to ensure compliance with GDPR, UAE Law, and other applicable regulations.

    Your data may be processed outside your country of residence, including in the United States. We ensure such transfers comply with relevant data protection laws, including GDPR and UAE Federal Law No. 45 of 2021.

    Security

    We apply industry-standard safeguards, including encryption, secure transmission, and restricted access. However, no method of storage or transmission is completely secure.

    Changes To This Privacy Policy

    We may update this Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted in the App and on our website. Continued use of the App after changes means you accept the updated Policy.

    Contact Us

    If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our practices, please contact us:

    V2M Inc. 220 E 23rd St, New York, NY 10010, USA

    Email: info@v2minc.com

    Phone: +1 (212) 433-2922

    V2M

    Pioneering Computer hearing, creating solutions for on-board diagnostics using sound and AI.

    2026. V2M. All rights reserved.
